proposal_items.title: Landing Narrative
proposal_items.intent: Keep the public landing emotionally charged while staying aligned to the current governance version and release truth.

proposal_items.title: Role System
proposal_items.intent: Define how agents balance contract discipline, creative exploration, and operator sovereignty across docs updates.

proposal_items.title: Visual Direction
proposal_items.intent: Push the landing into a mission-control visual posture with rich but bounded animation and readable system hierarchy.

proposal_items.title: Release Reflection
proposal_items.intent: Generate version-close reasoning, residual risks, and next-version pressure without softening governance boundaries.

proposal_items.title: Mission Control Experience
proposal_items.intent: Keep the landing behaving like an operator console rather than a glossy showcase while preserving experimental motion.

proposal_items.title: Cognitive Debt Analyst
proposal_items.intent: Translate hallucination and reasoning risk into enterprise-readable debt language with explicit decisions and mitigations.

proposal_items.title: Specialist MCP Composer
proposal_items.intent: Describe which specialist MCP capability should be composed for a service or tier without centralizing runtime implementation.

proposal_items.title: Solution Packaging Narrative
proposal_items.intent: Explain the SaaS tiers as operating commitments with distinct receipts, handoff rules, and customer expectations.
